name: the pre-write governor denies an ADR whose proposed prose proposes a forbidden design, before save
command: printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"0001-x.md","content":"# ADR\nWe will leave ingress unrestricted at 0.0.0.0/0.\n"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'write denied before save' e.txt && echo adr-prose-denied 1>&2
